HotelProperty.title: HotelProperty
HotelProperty.description: Represents a single hotel hotel managed by SUKHA OS, serving as the top-level entity for multi-tenancy.

id.description: Unique identifier for the HotelProperty entity.

entityId.description: Reference to the HotelProperty itself, primarily used for enforcing multi-tenancy. (Relationship: HotelProperty 1:1 HotelProperty)

name.description: The official name of the hotel hotel.

address.description: The physical address of the hotel.

phone.description: The primary contact phone number for the hotel.

email.description: The primary contact email address for the hotel.

gstin.description: The Goods and Services Tax Identification Number (GSTIN) of the hotel.

pan.description: The Permanent Account Number (PAN) of the hotel.

logoUrl.description: URL to the hotel's logo image, for branding purposes.

isActive.description: Indicates if the hotel hotel is currently active in the system.

createdAt.description: Timestamp when the hotel hotel record was created.

updatedAt.description: Timestamp when the hotel hotel record was last updated.

UserProfile.title: UserProfile
UserProfile.description: Stores user-specific information, mirroring Firebase Authentication details, and defines roles and permissions for access control.

id.description: Unique identifier for the UserProfile entity (matches Firebase Auth UID).

entityId.description: Reference to the HotelProperty this user belongs to. (Relationship: HotelProperty 1:N UserProfile)

name.description: The full name of the user.

email.description: The user's email address, used for authentication.

isActive.description: Indicates if the user account is currently active.

role.description: The role assigned to the user, defining their access permissions (e.g., owner, admin, manager, staff, frontdesk, supervisor).

permissions.description: A list of system modules the user is allowed to access.

createdAt.description: Timestamp when the user profile was created.

updatedAt.description: Timestamp when the user profile was last updated.

RoomType.title: RoomType
RoomType.description: Defines categories or types of rooms available in the hotel, along with their characteristics.

id.description: Unique identifier for the RoomType entity.

entityId.description: Reference to the HotelProperty to which this room type belongs. (Relationship: HotelProperty 1:N RoomType)

name.description: The descriptive name of the room type (e.g., 'Deluxe King', 'Standard Twin').

baseRate.description: The standard base rate per night for this room type.

description.description: A detailed description of the room type and its features.

maxOccupancy.description: The maximum number of guests allowed in rooms of this type.

amenities.description: A list of amenities available in rooms of this type.

createdAt.description: Timestamp when the room type record was created.

updatedAt.description: Timestamp when the room type record was last updated.

Room.title: Room
Room.description: Represents an individual physical room in the hotel, tracking its current status and type.

id.description: Unique identifier for the Room entity.

entityId.description: Reference to the HotelProperty to which this room belongs. (Relationship: HotelProperty 1:N Room)

roomNumber.description: The unique identifying number or name of the room (e.g., '101', 'Penthouse A').

floor.description: The floor number where the room is located.

roomTypeId.description: Reference to the RoomType that categorizes this room. (Relationship: RoomType 1:N Room)

status.description: The current operational status of the room (e.g., 'available', 'occupied', 'cleaning', 'maintenance').

createdAt.description: Timestamp when the room record was created.

updatedAt.description: Timestamp when the room record was last updated.

Guest.title: Guest
Guest.description: Stores profile information for guests who stay at the hotel.

id.description: Unique identifier for the Guest entity.

entityId.description: Reference to the HotelProperty this guest is associated with. (Relationship: HotelProperty 1:N Guest)

name.description: The full name of the guest.

phone.description: The primary contact phone number of the guest.

email.description: The email address of the guest.

address.description: The mailing address of the guest.

idProofType.description: The type of identification document provided by the guest (e.g., 'Passport', 'Aadhar Card', 'Driving License').

idProofNumber.description: The identification number from the provided document.

smsOptIn.description: Indicates if the guest has opted in for SMS communications.

notes.description: Any additional notes or special instructions regarding the guest.

createdAt.description: Timestamp when the guest record was created.

updatedAt.description: Timestamp when the guest record was last updated.

BookingSource.title: BookingSource
BookingSource.description: Lists various channels or platforms through which reservations can be made.

id.description: Unique identifier for the BookingSource entity.

entityId.description: Reference to the HotelProperty to which this booking source belongs. (Relationship: HotelProperty 1:N BookingSource)

name.description: The name of the booking source (e.g., 'Walk-in', 'Booking.com', 'Corporate').

commissionPct.description: The commission percentage associated with this booking source.

isActive.description: Indicates if the booking source is currently active and usable.

createdAt.description: Timestamp when the booking source record was created.

updatedAt.description: Timestamp when the booking source record was last updated.

Reservation.title: Reservation
Reservation.description: Represents a future or planned booking for a guest, potentially for a specific room or room type.

id.description: Unique identifier for the Reservation entity.

entityId.description: Reference to the HotelProperty that manages this reservation. (Relationship: HotelProperty 1:N Reservation)

guestId.description: Reference to the Guest for whom the reservation is made. (Relationship: Guest 1:N Reservation)

roomId.description: Reference to the specific Room reserved (if assigned). (Relationship: Room 1:N Reservation)

roomTypeId.description: Reference to the RoomType booked. (Relationship: RoomType 1:N Reservation)

checkInDate.description: The scheduled date and time for check-in.

checkOutDate.description: The scheduled date and time for check-out. Optional.

status.description: The current status of the reservation (e.g., 'pending', 'confirmed', 'checked_in', 'checked_out', 'cancelled').

numberOfGuests.description: The total number of guests included in the reservation.

specialRequests.description: Any special requests or notes from the guest regarding the reservation.

bookingSourceId.description: Reference to the BookingSource through which the reservation was made. (Relationship: BookingSource 1:N Reservation)

createdAt.description: Timestamp when the reservation record was created.

updatedAt.description: Timestamp when the reservation record was last updated.

Stay.title: Stay
Stay.description: Records the details of an active or completed stay of a guest in a specific room.

id.description: Unique identifier for the Stay entity.

entityId.description: Reference to the HotelProperty managing this stay. (Relationship: HotelProperty 1:N Stay)

reservationId.description: Reference to the Reservation this stay originated from, if any. (Relationship: Reservation 1:N Stay)

guestId.description: Reference to the Guest associated with this stay. (Relationship: Guest 1:N Stay)

roomId.description: Reference to the specific Room where the guest is staying. (Relationship: Room 1:N Stay)

checkInTime.description: The actual date and time of check-in for the stay.

checkOutTime.description: The actual date and time of check-out for the stay. (Nullable if stay is active)

rentPerNight.description: The agreed-upon rent per night for this specific stay.

bookingSourceId.description: Reference to the BookingSource that generated this stay. (Relationship: BookingSource 1:N Stay)

gstRate.description: The applicable GST rate for this stay (e.g., 12.0).

cgstAmount.description: The Central GST amount calculated for the stay.

sgstAmount.description: The State GST amount calculated for the stay.

totalAmount.description: The total amount charged for the stay, including all taxes.

status.description: The current status of the stay (e.g., 'active', 'checked_out').

specialRequests.description: Any special requests noted during the stay.

otaRef.description: Reference number from an Online Travel Agency (OTA) if applicable.

createdAt.description: Timestamp when the stay record was created.

updatedAt.description: Timestamp when the stay record was last updated.

GstSetting.title: GstSetting
GstSetting.description: Stores GST (Goods and Services Tax) configuration details for the hotel.

id.description: Unique identifier for the GstSetting entity. Could be 'default' or match entityId for 1:1 mapping per hotel.

entityId.description: Reference to the HotelProperty to which these GST settings apply. (Relationship: HotelProperty 1:1 GstSetting)

gstin.description: The Goods and Services Tax Identification Number (GSTIN) used for these settings.

sacCode.description: The Service Accounting Code (SAC) relevant to hotel services.

roomGstRate.description: The GST rate for Room Rents (e.g., 5.0).

roomCgstRate.description: The CGST rate for Room Rents (e.g., 2.5).

roomSgstRate.description: The SGST rate for Room Rents (e.g., 2.5).

serviceGstRate.description: The GST rate for Services/Monthly Rent (e.g., 18.0).

serviceCgstRate.description: The CGST rate for Services/Monthly Rent (e.g., 9.0).

serviceSgstRate.description: The SGST rate for Services/Monthly Rent (e.g., 9.0).

isComposite.description: Indicates if the hotel operates under a composite GST scheme.

compositeRate.description: The composite GST rate, if applicable.

createdAt.description: Timestamp when the GST settings record was created.

updatedAt.description: Timestamp when the GST settings record was last updated.

Invoice.title: Invoice
Invoice.description: Represents a financial invoice generated for a guest's stay or other services.

id.description: Unique identifier for the Invoice entity.

entityId.description: Reference to the HotelProperty that issued this invoice. (Relationship: HotelProperty 1:N Invoice)

stayId.description: Reference to the Stay for which this invoice was generated. (Relationship: Stay 1:N Invoice)

guestId.description: Reference to the Guest to whom this invoice is issued. (Relationship: Guest 1:N Invoice)

invoiceNumber.description: A unique, auto-generated sequence number for the invoice.

gstAmount.description: The total GST amount applied to the invoice.

totalAmount.description: The grand total amount of the invoice, including taxes.

paidAmount.description: The amount that has been paid towards this invoice.

balance.description: The outstanding balance remaining on the invoice.

status.description: The current status of the invoice (e.g., 'draft', 'issued', 'paid', 'cancelled').

paymentMethod.description: The method of payment used for the invoice (e.g., 'Cash', 'Card', 'UPI').

notes.description: Any additional notes or remarks on the invoice.

createdAt.description: Timestamp when the invoice record was created.

updatedAt.description: Timestamp when the invoice record was last updated.

Expense.title: Expense
Expense.description: Represents a business expense for the hotel property.

HousekeepingTask.title: HousekeepingTask
HousekeepingTask.description: Manages tasks related to room cleaning, maintenance, and inspection.

id.description: Unique identifier for the HousekeepingTask entity.

entityId.description: Reference to the HotelProperty managing this task. (Relationship: HotelProperty 1:N HousekeepingTask)

roomId.description: Reference to the Room for which the task is assigned. (Relationship: Room 1:N HousekeepingTask)

taskType.description: The category or type of the task (e.g., 'cleaning', 'deep_cleaning', 'maintenance', 'repair', 'inspection', 'preventive_maintenance', 'routine_cleaning').

assignedStaffId.description: Reference to the UserProfile of the staff member assigned to this task. (Relationship: UserProfile 1:N HousekeepingTask)

status.description: The current state of the task (e.g., 'pending', 'in_progress', 'completed', 'cancelled').

priority.description: The urgency level of the task (e.g., 'low', 'medium', 'high', 'urgent').

dueTime.description: The timestamp by which the task is expected to be completed.

notes.description: Additional notes or instructions for the task.

createdAt.description: Timestamp when the housekeeping task record was created.

updatedAt.description: Timestamp when the housekeeping task record was last updated.

Notification.title: Notification
Notification.description: Stores notifications generated by the system for specific users.

id.description: Unique identifier for the Notification entity.

entityId.description: Reference to the HotelProperty that generated this notification. (Relationship: HotelProperty 1:N Notification)

userId.description: Reference to the UserProfile who is the recipient of this notification. (Relationship: UserProfile 1:N Notification)

title.description: The title or subject of the notification.

message.description: The main content or body of the notification.

type.description: The category or type of notification (e.g., 'alert', 'info', 'task_assigned', 'approval_request').

status.description: The current status of the notification (e.g., 'sent', 'read', 'approved').

createdAt.description: Timestamp when the notification record was created.

updatedAt.description: Timestamp when the notification record was last updated.

SystemActivityLog.title: SystemActivityLog
SystemActivityLog.description: Records significant actions and state changes within the system for auditing purposes.

id.description: Unique identifier for the SystemActivityLog entity.

entityId.description: Reference to the HotelProperty where the activity occurred. (Relationship: HotelProperty 1:N SystemActivityLog)

action.description: A brief description of the action performed (e.g., 'User Login', 'Room Status Update', 'Invoice Issued').

description.description: A more detailed description of the activity.

module.description: The application module where the activity took place (e.g., 'Auth', 'Reservations', 'Housekeeping').

performedBy.description: Reference to the UserProfile who performed the action. (Relationship: UserProfile 1:N SystemActivityLog)

metadata.description: A flexible map for storing additional contextual data related to the activity.

createdAt.description: Timestamp when the system activity was logged.

updatedAt.description: Timestamp when the system activity log was last updated.

LaundryItem.title: LaundryItem
LaundryItem.description: Defines different types of laundry items offered as a service, with associated rates.

id.description: Unique identifier for the LaundryItem entity.

entityId.description: Reference to the HotelProperty that offers this laundry item. (Relationship: HotelProperty 1:N LaundryItem)

itemName.description: The name of the laundry item (e.g., 'Shirt', 'Towel', 'Bed Sheet').

itemType.description: The category of the laundry item (e.g., 'linen', 'guest').

vendorRate.description: The cost charged by the hotel laundry vendor for processing this item.

hotelRate.description: The rate charged by the hotel to the guest for this item. (Nullable if only vendor rate applies or guest rate is calculated dynamically)

unit.description: The unit of measure for the item (e.g., 'piece', 'kg').

description.description: A description or specifications of the laundry item.

createdAt.description: Timestamp when the laundry item record was created.

updatedAt.description: Timestamp when the laundry item record was last updated.

GuestLaundryOrder.title: GuestLaundryOrder
GuestLaundryOrder.description: Records a guest's specific laundry order, including items, quantities, and billing status.

id.description: Unique identifier for the GuestLaundryOrder entity.

entityId.description: Reference to the HotelProperty that received this laundry order. (Relationship: HotelProperty 1:N GuestLaundryOrder)

guestId.description: Reference to the Guest who placed the laundry order. (Relationship: Guest 1:N GuestLaundryOrder)

roomId.description: Reference to the Room from which the laundry order was placed. (Relationship: Room 1:N GuestLaundryOrder)

guestName.description: The name of the guest who placed the order (denormalized for quick access).

roomNumber.description: The room number from which the order was placed (denormalized for quick access).

orderDate.description: The date and time when the laundry order was placed.

status.description: The current processing status of the laundry order (e.g., 'sent', 'returned', 'billed').

paymentStatus.description: The payment status of the laundry order (e.g., 'pending', 'paid').

vendorTotal.description: The total cost from the vendor for this order.

hotelTotal.description: The total amount charged by the hotel to the guest for this order.

amountPaid.description: The amount already paid by the guest for this order.

balance.description: The remaining balance due for this laundry order.

itemIds.description: References to individual GuestLaundryOrderItem records belonging to this order. (Relationship: GuestLaundryOrder 1:N GuestLaundryOrderItem)

createdAt.description: Timestamp when the guest laundry order record was created.

updatedAt.description: Timestamp when the guest laundry order record was last updated.

GuestLaundryOrderItem.title: GuestLaundryOrderItem
GuestLaundryOrderItem.description: Represents a single item within a guest's laundry order, detailing its quantity and specific rates.

id.description: Unique identifier for the GuestLaundryOrderItem entity.

entityId.description: Reference to the HotelProperty this item belongs to. (Relationship: HotelProperty 1:N GuestLaundryOrderItem)

guestLaundryOrderId.description: Reference to the GuestLaundryOrder this item is part of. (Relationship: GuestLaundryOrder 1:N GuestLaundryOrderItem)

itemId.description: Reference to the LaundryItem that was ordered. (Relationship: LaundryItem 1:N GuestLaundryOrderItem)

quantity.description: The quantity of this specific laundry item.

vendorRate.description: The vendor rate for this specific item at the time of order.

hotelRate.description: The hotel rate for this specific item at the time of order.

vendorTotal.description: The calculated total cost from the vendor for this item quantity.

hotelTotal.description: The calculated total amount charged by the hotel for this item quantity.

returned.description: Indicates if this specific item has been returned to the guest.

createdAt.description: Timestamp when the guest laundry order item record was created.

updatedAt.description: Timestamp when the guest laundry order item record was last updated.

DailyTeam.title: DailyTeam
DailyTeam.description: Stores the daily assignments of staff into teams for housekeeping or other operational tasks, with an automatic expiration.

id.description: Unique identifier for the DailyTeam entity.

entityId.description: Reference to the HotelProperty for which these daily teams are assigned. (Relationship: HotelProperty 1:N DailyTeam)

date.description: The specific date for which these teams are assigned (format YYYY-MM-DD).

teamAssignmentIds.description: References to the DailyTeamAssignment records for this specific day, each representing an assigned team. (Relationship: DailyTeam 1:N DailyTeamAssignment)

expireAt.description: Timestamp when this daily team record is set to expire via Firestore TTL.

createdAt.description: Timestamp when the daily team record was created.

updatedAt.description: Timestamp when the daily team record was last updated.

DailyTeamAssignment.title: DailyTeamAssignment
DailyTeamAssignment.description: Represents a single team assigned for a specific day, including its name, color, and members.

id.description: Unique identifier for the DailyTeamAssignment entity.

entityId.description: Reference to the HotelProperty to which this team assignment belongs. (Relationship: HotelProperty 1:N DailyTeamAssignment)

dailyTeamId.description: Reference to the DailyTeam entity this assignment is part of. (Relationship: DailyTeam 1:N DailyTeamAssignment)

name.description: The name of the team (e.g., 'Team Alpha').

color.description: A color code associated with the team for visual identification (e.g., '#FF0000').

memberIds.description: References to the UserProfile IDs of the staff members in this team. (Relationship: DailyTeamAssignment N:N UserProfile)

createdAt.description: Timestamp when the daily team assignment record was created.

updatedAt.description: Timestamp when the daily team assignment record was last updated.
